# Ham

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Ham;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Ham { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
food, pork, pig, meat, bone, hock, knuckle, gammon, cured

## Categories
food-beverage
